title: RealMLP expert with shifted original-data fold
summary: Pair competition fold k with original-data fold k+1 for diversity.
rationale: The current best parent is 001199 with CV 0.9544491320 and public 0.95409. This hypothesis is an atomic child patch intended to exploit the confirmed two-seed RealMLP core plus low-weight CatBoost correction direction.
implementation_hint: Start from 001199. Add an extra RealMLP expert whose competition fold split is unchanged, but whose original auxiliary rows are selected from the next fold index. Validation remains competition-only. Blend the expert lightly.
expected_effect: Create a slightly different auxiliary-data training distribution without changing competition validation.
risk: The shifted fold design may be arbitrary and add noise.
